basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Research Assistant/ Project technical Support II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.post_name: Research Assistant/ Project technical Support II
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) has released the official Research Assistant/ Project Technical Support II Notification 2026. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the AIIMS Delhi Research Assistant/ Project Technical Support II Recruitment 2026. Candidates holding a Bachelor's degree in Technology with experience in computer systems and data science, or an M.D.S. in Oral Pathology and Microbiology are eligible to apply online on or before 15-07-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelors degree in Technology with experience in computer systems and data science, M.D.S in Oral Pathology and Microbiology
qualification.details: Bachelors degree in Technology with experience in computer systems and data science OR M.D.S in Oral Pathology and Microbiology.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Research Assistant/ Project technical Support II

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Research Assistant/ Project technical Support II

salary_details.details: Rs. 28,000/- + HRA as admissible Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Research Assistant/ Project technical Support II Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. AIIMS Delhi Research Assistant/ Project technical Support II Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Research Assistant/ Project technical Support II Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Research Assistant/ Project technical Support II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Research Assistant/ Project technical Support II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the AIIMS Delhi Research Assistant/ Project technical Support II posts is 15th July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced for this recruitment?
faq.answer: AIIMS Delhi has announced a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Research Assistant/ Project technical Support II in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant/ Project technical Support II post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelors degree in Technology with experience in computer systems and data science, or an M.D.S degree in Oral Pathology and Microbiology to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Research Assistant/ Project technical Support II position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 28,000/- plus admissible House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, as per the available information.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Research Assistant/ Project technical Support II position?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will involve an Interview followed by Document Verification of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: Interested and eligible candidates can apply for this recruitment through the online mode only. The application link will be available on the official website.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job offered under this recruitment drive is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is AIIMS Delhi located?
faq.answer: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110029.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from any state apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification is released by AIIMS Delhi, which is located in Delhi. While candidates from all over India are generally encouraged to apply for government jobs, it's best to check the official notification for any specific state-related eligibility or preference.
